ramp.disabledDescription: No ramp providers are configured. Set env vars for at least one provider (Etherfuse, AlfredPay, BlindPay) in your environment. See env.sample.
ramp.pageDescription: Convert between local currency and USDC on Stellar. Choose a provider, enter an amount, and follow the steps.

walletStatus.activateUnavailable: Wallet activation is unavailable for this session
walletStatus.walletSetupDescription: Connect a Stellar wallet or continue with Pollar's embedded wallet.
walletStatus.pendingActivationHint: Pending embedded wallets may need server activation.

suppliersPage.title: Supplier Directory
suppliersPage.description: Browse verified suppliers across LATAM. Each supplier can be linked to a deal for milestone-based payment via escrow.
suppliersPage.noResultsEmpty: No suppliers have been registered yet.
suppliersPage.noResultsFiltered: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

investorsPage.title: Investor Directory
investorsPage.subtitle: Active capital partners funding supply-chain deals on MERCATO
investorsPage.emptyAdjustSearch: Try adjusting your search or filters

pymesPage.title: SMB Directory
pymesPage.subtitle: Small and medium businesses seeking supply-chain financing across LATAM
pymesPage.emptyHint: Try adjusting your search or filters.
pymesPage.tierDescBuilding: Has funded deals in progress. Reputation grows as they complete repayments.
pymesPage.tierDescEstablished: Has completed at least one deal. Shows consistent repayment behavior.
pymesPage.tierDescTopPerformer: Multiple deals completed and significant amount repaid. Strong track record for investors.

deliveries.title: Delivery proof
deliveries.description: Deals where you are the supplier. Upload proof of shipment or delivery from each deal page.
deliveries.emptyDescription: You don't have any funded deals with pending milestones. When a deal you supply is funded, it will appear here so you can upload proof of shipment or delivery.

investments.allocationEmpty: Fund a deal to see how capital is spread across borrowers.
investments.maturitiesEmpty: No scheduled maturities on active positions.
investments.tabEmpty: No positions in this view yet.
investments.subtitle: Live portfolio metrics, yield accrual, and escrow-backed positions in one place.
investments.emptyDescription: Deals you fund will appear here. Browse open deals to find opportunities.
investments.securityBody: Your capital is held in a non-custodial Stellar smart contract. Releases are milestone-gated and controlled by the deal parties and platform.
investments.ctaSubtitle: Browse open deals seeking funding on the marketplace.

dealDetail.fundDialogDescription: Connect your Stellar wallet to fund this deal with USDC. Your wallet will be recorded as the investor for this deal.
dealDetail.signInInvestorFund: Sign in as an investor to fund this deal.
dealDetail.escrowDeploying: Escrow deploying — refresh shortly to fund.
dealDetail.extendDescription: Choose how many days to extend this deal. Extension is only allowed while the deal is unfunded.
dealDetail.confirmDeliveryDescription: Confirm that you received the product. This approves the final 50% milestone on-chain; admin will then release the funds to the supplier. The PyME (buyer) confirms delivery; admin can release funds from the admin panel after confirmation. Connect your Stellar wallet to sign.
dealDetail.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Received in good condition, date received…
dealDetail.milestonesSubtitle: Funds released in stages as delivery is confirmed on-chain
dealDetail.pymeWillConfirmMilestone: The PyME (buyer) will confirm this milestone when they receive the goods.
dealDetail.escrowPendingDeploy: Escrow contract will be deployed after funding
dealDetail.documentsEmpty: Documents will appear here after milestones
dealDetail.includesBonus: Includes {pct}% bonus APR offered by the PyME.
escrowTrustPoints: Dispute resolution built into the contract
dealDetail.toastExtendIneligible: Deal is no longer eligible for extension.
dealDetail.notFoundHelp: The deal you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access.
dealDetail.toastFundSignIn: You must be signed in to fund a deal.
dealDetail.toastMissingWallet: Missing deal or wallet. Connect your Stellar wallet.
dealDetail.toastConnectWalletAccept: Connect your Stellar wallet to accept the order.
dealDetail.toastOrderAccepted: Order accepted. Admin will release the milestone to unlock 50%.
dealDetail.toastMissingProofWallet: Missing deal, milestone, or wallet. Connect your Stellar wallet.
dealDetail.toastConnectWalletDelivery: Connect your Stellar wallet to confirm delivery.
dealDetail.toastOnlyPymeOrAdminDelivery: Only the PyME (buyer) or admin can confirm delivery.
dealDetail.toastDeliveryConfirmed: Delivery confirmed. Admin will release the final 50% to the supplier.
dealDetail.toastOnlyPymeExtend: Only the PyME owner can extend the funding window.
dealDetail.toastExtendNotEligibleDeal: This deal is not eligible for extension.
dealDetail.toastInvalidExtensionDays: Enter a valid extension duration in days.
dealDetail.errorDealIneligibleExtendDb: Deal is no longer eligible for extension.
dealDetail.errorFundingDbSync: Funding succeeded on-chain but the deal could not be updated. Please refresh the page or contact support.
dealDetail.errorMilestoneStatusTx: Failed to create milestone status transaction
dealDetail.escrowDeployingShort: Escrow deploying — refresh shortly to fund.

supplierDetail.productsDescription: Catalog of products offered with unit prices and ordering details
supplierDetail.recentDealsDescription: Deals where this supplier is involved

investorDetail.metaDescription: Investor profile and funded deals for {name} on MERCATO.
investorDetail.fundedDealsDescription: Supply-chain deals funded by this investor on MERCATO

smbDetail.dealsDescription: Supply-chain financing deals created by this SMB

adminDashboard.tagline: Monitor platform health, clear milestone queues, and keep escrow releases moving.
adminDashboard.pendingEscrowSingle: 1 milestone on escrow needs your wallet signature to release funds.
adminDashboard.pendingEscrowPlural: {count} milestones on escrow need your wallet signature to release funds.
adminDashboard.releaseQueueSingle: 1 completed milestone may still need an on-chain release.
adminDashboard.releaseQueuePlural: {count} completed milestones may still need an on-chain release.
adminDashboard.allClearHint: No escrow milestones waiting for admin action right now.
adminDashboard.vaultHintReady: DeFindex vault address is set for treasury operations.
adminDashboard.vaultHintMissing: Deploy or configure the platform vault in the admin hub.
adminDashboard.queueEmpty: No milestones waiting in the escrow queue.
adminDashboard.opApprovalsDesc: Approve and release USDC from Trustless Work escrow. Wallet required.
adminDashboard.opReleaseDesc: Fallback release for completed milestones not yet paid on-chain.
adminDashboard.opDealsDesc: Full deal list with status, parties, and milestone progress.
adminDashboard.opMarketplaceDesc: Browse all live and historical deals on the public marketplace.
adminDashboard.opSuppliersDesc: Review supplier companies and catalogs across the network.
adminDashboard.opRampDesc: Access on/off-ramp flows (same as end users; for support context).
adminDashboard.opVaultDesc: Configure and operate the platform DeFindex vault for treasury.
adminDashboard.opVaultMonitorDesc: Live TVL, strategy allocations, paused strategies, and operational alerts.

adminPage.title: Milestone approvals
adminPage.subtitle: Approve milestones to release funds from escrow. Connect your admin wallet to sign on-chain.
adminPage.subtitleEmpty: Approve milestones to release funds from escrow on-chain.
adminPage.pendingEmptyDescription: No deals with escrow yet. When suppliers accept orders or upload delivery proof, milestones will appear here.
adminPage.noPending: There are no pending milestone approvals.
adminPage.releaseSubtitle: Milestones approved in the app that may still need an on-chain release transaction.
adminPage.releaseEmptyHint: Completed milestones waiting for on-chain release will appear here.
adminPage.releaseListHint: These milestones were approved but may still need an on-chain release transaction.
adminPage.vaultSubtitle: Deploy or configure the platform DeFindex vault used for treasury operations.
adminPage.vaultPageSubtitle: Monitor live vault health, allocations, and risks — or deploy and configure a new vault.

adminVaultMonitor.title: Vault monitor
adminVaultMonitor.subtitle: Live view of TVL, strategy allocations, roles, and operational alerts. Refreshes every 30 seconds.
adminVaultMonitor.watchHint: Defaults to your env vault. Paste another C… address to watch a newly deployed vault before it is in .env.
adminVaultMonitor.noVaultToWatch: Enter a vault contract address (C…) or configure NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFINDEX_VAULT_ADDRESS.
adminVaultMonitor.noAssets: No managed funds reported for this vault yet.
adminVaultMonitor.noStrategies: No strategies linked for this asset.
adminVaultMonitor.autoRefreshHint: Auto-refresh every 30s while this tab is open. Review alerts before investor deposits.
adminVaultMonitor.activationSubtitle: Complete the on-chain initialization: a small first deposit, then rebalance idle funds into your strategy. Sign with the vault manager or rebalance manager wallet.
adminVaultMonitor.activationCompleteHint: TVL is allocated to strategies. Investors can deposit once the vault address is in your app environment.
adminVaultMonitor.connectWallet: Connect your admin wallet to sign deposit and rebalance transactions.
adminVaultMonitor.callerRoleHint: For rebalance, prefer connecting as the rebalance manager or manager role on this vault.
adminVaultMonitor.callerRoleWarning: Your wallet is not the configured rebalance/manager role — the transaction may fail on-chain.
adminVaultMonitor.stepDepositDesc: Send a minimum deposit to the vault contract. Use testnet BlendUSDC in your wallet on testnet.
adminVaultMonitor.stepRebalanceDesc: Move idle vault cash into your DeFindex strategy so yield can accrue.
adminVaultMonitor.noStrategy: No strategy available to invest into.
adminVaultMonitor.noIdle: No idle funds to rebalance. Deposit first or refresh.
adminVaultMonitor.trustSubtitle: The vault uses a Soroban SAC contract (C…), not classic USDC. Sign “Add trustline” below or you’ll see TokenErrors.MissingTrustline on deposit.
adminVaultMonitor.trustSacStep: After the faucet, add SAC trust on the contract below —
adminVaultMonitor.trustClassicReceived: Blend faucet credited classic USDC ({amount}) — that alone is not enough for this vault.
adminVaultMonitor.trustReady: Asset trustline detected on your wallet.
adminVaultMonitor.trustReadySac: SAC trustline recorded — you can try the vault deposit.
adminVaultMonitor.trustConnectWallet: Connect your wallet to add a trustline.
adminVaultMonitor.trustMissingError: Missing trustline — add the asset trustline below, then retry deposit.

adminEscrows.pendingCardDescription: First 50%: supplier accepted — use Approve then Release. Second 50%: PyME confirmed delivery — use Release only (approval already done by PyME).
adminEscrows.fallbackCardDescription: Milestones marked completed in DB. Use Approve if not yet approved on-chain; use Release to send funds. PyME-confirmed milestones are already approved — use Release only.

adminPending.connectWallet: Connect your Stellar wallet to approve.
adminPending.approveSuccess: Milestone "{title}" approved on-chain. Click Release to send funds.
adminPending.releaseConnect: Connect your Stellar wallet to release funds.
adminPending.releaseBlockedOrder: Release the previous milestone first (on-chain order).
adminPending.emptyPendingList: There are no pending milestone approvals.
adminPending.fallbackEmpty: No completed milestones. Completed milestones will appear here so you can trigger release if needed.
adminPending.releasePreviousTooltip: Release the previous milestone first (Shipment → Delivery)

reputationCard.title: Reputation
reputationCard.description: Score and committed stake for this account

blindpaySetup.pageDescription: Complete these steps to add funds via BlindPay.
blindpaySetup.step1Description: Open the link below to accept BlindPay's Terms of Service. You may need to complete this in a new tab. After accepting, return to this page — you may be redirected back automatically with a confirmation.
blindpaySetup.step1Hint: If you were redirected back with a tos_id in the URL, you can continue to Step 2.
blindpaySetup.tosPrompt: Paste the tos_id from the ToS completion page (if BlindPay showed it):
blindpaySetup.step2Description: Enter your details for BlindPay verification. On development instances, KYC is usually auto-approved.
blindpaySetup.step3Description: Connect your Stellar wallet to receive USDC when you add funds via BlindPay.
blindpaySetup.toastTosOpen: Complete the Terms of Service in the new tab, then return here.
blindpaySetup.toastKycSuccess: KYC submitted. Register your wallet next.

supplierProfile.visibleToPymes: Visible to PyMEs when they browse suppliers
supplierProfile.catalogForCompany: Products listed under {name}. PyMEs choose quantity when creating a deal.
supplierProfile.title: Supplier profile
supplierProfile.subtitle: Company bio and product catalog. PyMEs select from your catalog when creating deals.
supplierProfile.firstCompanyDescription: You can add multiple supplier companies under one account. Start with one.
supplierProfile.companyDetailsDescription: Country, sector, phone, and bio for this company. Shown to PyMEs when they browse suppliers.
supplierProfile.catalogDescription: Add and manage products for this company. PyMEs choose quantity when creating a deal.
supplierProfile.noProductsHint: Add your first product so PyMEs can select from your catalog.
supplierProfile.noMatchesHint: Try a different search or category filter.
supplierProfile.dialogAddCompanyDescription: Add another supplier company to your account. Each company has its own catalog and bio.
supplierProfile.dialogAddProductDescription: Name, category, and price per unit (USDC) are required. PyMEs will set quantity when creating a deal.
supplierProfile.dialogEditProductDescription: Update name, category, price, or description.
supplierProfile.deleteDescription: This will remove "{name}" from your catalog. PyMEs will no longer see it when creating deals. This cannot be undone.
supplierProfile.toastProductFields: Enter product name, category, and a valid price.
supplierProfile.placeholderBioPh: e.g., We supply wholesale ingredients to bakeries and restaurants…
supplierProfile.formProductImageSelect: Drag & drop an image here, or click to select
supplierProfile.toastImageSizeError: File is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
supplierProfile.toastImageTypeError: Unsupported file format. Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image.

reputationTooltip.title: Reputation breakdown
reputationTooltip.tierRuleBuilding: At least one deal funded, none completed
reputationTooltip.footerNote: All inputs come directly from on-chain deal status and amounts — no manual edits.
